rejected_findings.finding: All 8 UI test scenarios failed (auth_flow, page_loads, console_errors, responsive_layout, navigation_works, forms_work, images_load, performance_check)
rejected_findings.reason: last_mile_test attempted to test https://mint.minibits.cash/Bitcoin as a web UI application. cashu-l402 is a TypeScript library/middleware — it has no web UI. The mint URL is a Cashu NUT-06 REST API endpoint that returns JSON, not HTML. All 8 failures are the same root cause: wrong test target type. Future runs should not regenerate last_mile_test tasks for this project.
